name: Betterhalf
one_liner: India’s first and only marriage super app
long_description:
Betterhalf is India's first and only matrimony app without parents.

We are the first and only marriage super app in India offering end-to-end matrimony and wedding products to urban Indians, who are the primary decision makers for their marriage and wedding decisions, unlike their parents who were in the driver's seat a decade ago.

Our ecosystem of products on marriage - matchmaking, courtship and wedding in one super app - and focused on the correct audience - high income, higher age urban working professionals of India who are located in 30 tier-1 cities of India makes Betterhalf product a winning combination. 

Our flagship product - matrimonial matchmaking - offers these users the world's fastest matching in a single click (US Patent No. 16/777,773). This matching technology is faster than Tinder and more accurate than eHarmony / Shaadi.com.

name: Camp
one_liner: A Nouns DAO governance client

name: Biodock
one_liner: Cloud AI microscopy automation
long_description:
Biodock's cloud platform accelerates microscopy analysis, automating months of microscopy analysis and infrastructure to minutes with our end-to-end AI architecture.  Scientists enjoy auto-scaling storage, GPU compute, and 30-50% more accurate analysis.

We're building an amazing experience to translate microscopy images to therapeutic insights for academic and enterprise scientists.

name: Venu AI
one_liner: Meet qualified leads in person by automating conference production
long_description: Meet qualified leads in person by automating conference production with Venu AI. Host a conference and meet 100 qualified sales leads in person every 3 months fully automated with Venu AI.

name: Manara
