one_liner: Embed charts, dashboards and exports in your app
long_description: DataShare is a data-as-a-service platform that lets you embed charts, dashboards and exports directly into your product. For example, if you run an accounting startup, DataShare would enable you to embed a full profit and loss dashboard, with downloadable statements. DataShare is backed by an enterprise-grade data warehouse, and can be implemented in fewer than 20 lines of code.

name: Revamp
one_liner: AI-Powered Customer Segmentation for eCommerce
long_description: Revamp helps eCommerce brands and agencies understand customer behavior by creating smarter segments for targeted email and paid acquisition campaigns.

name: CORE
one_liner: Your AI butler that understands you really well and proactively acts…
long_description:
CORE is your AI personal assistant that learns who you are, connects to your apps, and does the work before you ask. 

Open source. Self-hostable. Fully yours.

name: Subsets
one_liner: AI-driven Retention Automation for subscription media businesses.
long_description:
Subsets is the leading lifecycle growth platform for consumer subscription teams.

We are building the AI decisioning layer that unifies and powers the existing growth stack, enabling teams to automate and scale lifecycle experimentation, orchestrate personalized user journeys, and measure impact across retention, engagement, and LTV without engineering support.

Trusted by consumer subscription businesses like The Atlantic, NBCUniversal, Daily Mail, Matas Group, and Hearst.

Subsets has raised $6.1m and launched out of Y Combinator’s Summer 2023 batch in San Francisco, and is now based in Copenhagen.

name: Spine AI
one_liner: Manage a swarm of AI agents to get real work done
long_description:
Spine AI is a visual workspace where a single prompt spins up a swarm of AI agents that plan, delegate, and execute complex tasks together — with humans fully in the loop.

Instead of chatting back and forth with one model, Spine breaks work into visible steps on a shared canvas. Agents collaborate in parallel, ask clarifying questions, use connected tools, and show their reasoning and intermediate outputs as they work.

Every agent’s work stays inspectable, auditable, and editable — reducing hallucinations and giving you real control over the outcome.

Spine connects to leading AI models and your existing tools, but the real power comes from orchestration: you act as the team lead, Spine runs the swarm.

Chat is great for answers. Spine is built for execution.

name: Baud
one_liner: AI training chips and developer platform
long_description: Novel AI hardware and developer platform, built from first principles to let companies train, fine-tune, and deploy frontier models with orders of magnitude better performance than incumbents

name: Capi Money
one_liner: Helping businesses in emerging markets make pay their international…
long_description: Capi helps businesses in emerging markets make international payments. Importers in emerging markets pay up to 10% to settle invoices and wait weeks for payments to arrive. We’re on a mission to give businesses in emerging markets the same price and speed as we expect in the US and Europe.

name: SID
one_liner: AI research lab for retrieval
long_description: SID is an AI research lab based in San Francisco. We train models that can retrieve and reason over any data source.

name: Alguna
one_liner: AI-Native CPQ & Billing for Modern Pricing Models
long_description:
We are Alguna, building a modern platform that helps B2B companies price deals, send quotes, bill customers, and collect payments - all in one place.

Our mission is to create the most efficient revenue engine for B2B SaaS.

Today, many companies run these processes with spreadsheets and a patchwork of separate tools. That leads to slow approvals, manual work, mistakes, and missed revenue—especially as pricing gets more complex.

Alguna replaces that mess by connecting the entire flow from **quote to cash**: what sales sells becomes what finance bills, automatically. We help teams automate invoicing, handle usage-based or custom pricing, and reduce back-and-forth between sales, finance, and engineering.

The result: growth-stage startups and enterprises can close deals faster, bill accurately, and scale revenue operations without adding headcount or building internal systems.

name: Campfire
one_liner: The AI Native ERP for the fastest growing companies.
long_description: Campfire is the modern accounting platform for startups and mid-size tech companies. The fastest growing YC companies such as Replit, Posthog, SpeakAI run on Campfire. Our product includes an accounting general ledger that has multi-entity support and advanced financial reporting such as P&L by department and contribution margin by customer. Migrate from legacy accounting software to Campfire for your accounting and financial reporting to automate manual tasks and streamline workflows to unlock financial insights and accelerate the monthly close process.

name: Parea
one_liner: Test, evaluate & observe your LLM applications
long_description: Parea AI is the essential developer platform for debugging and monitoring every stage of LLM application development. We provide testing, evaluation, and monitoring in one unified platform. These capabilities help developers get visibility into LLM responses, quickly test and optimize prompts, and ensure customers get the best user experience.

name: Venta AI
one_liner: The compliant AI colleague for sales teams in Europe
long_description: Venta AI supports sales teams in Europe with targeted outreach. Our AI employee can access the best companies and contact details and carry out automated outreach in compliance with EU regulations.

name: Punchcard
one_liner: Agentive assurance system for auditors, risk consultants, and clients.
long_description:
Punchcard is a system designed for assurance engagements like financial statement audits and SOX control programs. Purpose-built for selecting, requesting, and testing audit evidence. Punchcard leverages assertion-driven AI agents that perform testing procedures from natural language instructions—just like an audit associate.

By combining critical workflows such as audit planning, client document requests, evidence testing, and workpaper documentation into one seamless platform, Agentive streamlines audit processes, reduces inefficiencies, and frees teams to focus on high-impact areas.

name: Bronco AI
one_liner: AI for ASIC Design Verification
long_description:
Bronco is an applied AI lab helping chipmakers keep Moore’s law going. Our mission is to build AI silicon verification engineers that find bugs, drive functional coverage, and help companies ship working chips on time.

We're currently deployed alongside verification teams at leading chip companies building next generation hardware (4 nm process node).

We are well-funded and backed by tier-1 investors, including YC, 8VC, Elad Gil, SV Angel, and Contrary Capital. We have also established strong relationships with the leading academic and industry researchers in the field of AI for chip design. Our advisors have won multiple Best Paper Awards at leading conferences, been cited tens of thousands of times, and received some of the highest honors in the microelectronics and EDA industries.

name: Kite
one_liner: Screen recorder for stunning product demo videos
long_description:
Kite is a screen recorder that makes your demo videos look like Apple commercials in minutes.

Simply record your app (works for iPhone recordings too!). Kite will track your cursor and keyboard inputs, so it can automatically zoom in on the action with professional 3D animations.

Kite is as easy as Canva, but your videos will look like they came out of OpenAI or Figma.

- One-click cinematic 3D animations
- Display recordings on 3D mockup devices (MacBooks, iPhones etc)
- Combine unlimited recordings into one video
- Edit, adjust speed and trim recordings
- Add text scenes and text annotations alongside recordings
- AI voiceovers using state of the art text to speech models
- Free music library
- Brand kit–upload your logos, colors and fonts
- Start from our template library or start from scratch

Kite is used by hundreds of YC companies for launch videos, social media posts, landing page demos, changelog updates, feature releases and more.

name: Obento Health
one_liner: CRM Co-Pilot for Medtech Sales
long_description: Obento Health is redefining the CRM experience for medical field sales. Designed specifically for healthcare, we are saving reps time from documentation and empowering reps to create more personalized interactions with their customers.

name: Docsum
one_liner: AI contract repository
long_description: Docsum is a contract intelligence platform designed for legal and finance teams. Using AI, Docsum extracts critical data like renewal dates, obligations, and more into a searchable database. The platform is fully customizable with features like custom field reporting, alerts, and playbook-powered redlining. Getting started is simple—upload contracts or connect Docsum to tools like Google Drive, DocuSign, and more.

name: Arcimus
one_liner: A stream of engineering candidates who ship.
long_description: We send founders and recruiting teams  a steady flow of engineers filtered with real engineering judgment.

name: MICSI
one_liner: Higher resolution MRI with faster scan times.
long_description: MICSI is introducing AI software that doubles resolution and halves scan time. This breakthrough enables imaging centers to significantly enhance their capacity and patient throughput, potentially saving countless lives and generating an additional $2 million of revenue per MRI scanner. Our initial offering serves as a stepping stone toward the company’s larger vision of transforming the MRI into a truly quantitative instrument that is capable of providing highly reproducible data for more accurate diagnoses and patient management.

name: Terminal
one_liner: Plaid for Telematics Data in Commercial Trucking
long_description:
Terminal is Plaid for telematics data in commercial trucking. Companies building next generation insurance products, financial services and fleet software for trucking use our Universal API to access GPS data, speeding data and vehicle stats.


Raghav (CEO) and Connor (CTO) led product and engineering at a series b-funded neobank where they spent 2.5 years integrating middleware APIs like Plaid & Stripe. Before that, Connor spent 3 years building software for his family-owned logistics company which was acquired by a private equity firm. Raghav’s family is in fleet operations and owns an HVAC company in San Francisco where they operate a fleet of 13 commercial vehicles.

name: Corgea
one_liner: Corgea finds, and fixes insecure code and packages autonomously.
long_description: Corgea is an autonomous application security platform that finds and validates vulnerabilities, then generates safe code fixes developers can apply in their existing workflow. In production customers like Zapier and Yageo, see ~20% more true positives and ~90% fewer false positives (vs their prior tooling), reducing triage and speeding remediation without adding headcount.

name: Serra
one_liner: Your 24/7 AI Recruiter
long_description: Serra is an AI recruiter that fully automates candidate sourcing and outreach, finding ideal talent from LinkedIn, GitHub, Crunchbase, and your ATS. Companies hiring Serra skip sourcing entirely and simply get qualified interviews on their calendar.

name: Outset
one_liner: AI-powered user interviews
long_description: Outset offers AI-powered user interviews to conduct qualitative research. Traditional surveys are fast but lack depth while live interviews produce high quality data but are slow and expensive. Outset uses LLMs to lead interviews and synthesize results so researchers get high quality data 100 times faster.

name: Hegel AI
one_liner: Open source tools for developing generative AI applications
long_description:
We build tools for developing applications with generative AI models. Whether you are using LLMs, vector databases, and text-to-image models like Stable Diffusion, our tools help you find the right model, prompt, configuration and consistently monitor their behaviors in production.

---

**PromptTools**: the first open-source, developer-focused SDK for experimenting with and evaluating prompts, models, and vector databases. You can try the repo here: https://github.com/hegelai/prompttools. If you're building with LLMs and struggling with evaluation, reach out and we can help.

name: Shasta Health
one_liner: AI calling & browser agents for healthcare
long_description: Shasta Health builds AI agents to handle patient calls, verify insurance and automate admin tasks for healthcare clinics

name: Health Harbor
one_liner: Using generative AI to call insurance for healthcare clinics
long_description:
We use generative AI to call insurance on behalf of healthcare clinics. We save clinics up to 40 hours of calls every week over existing outsourced human solutions. 

Compared to the existing solutions for benefits verifications: 
- We're faster -- by default, we have a turnaround of 24 hours compared to typically a 3 day turnaround for competitors
- We can reach more payors -- as long as they have a phone line, we can support calling them for benefits. There's quite a few payors in both medical and dental (e.g. Seledent) that have yet to offer a digital retrieval of benefits
- We're reliable and consistent -- there is no person-to-person variation or question skipping when it comes to working with software

name: Menza
one_liner: The AI data analyst for consumer brands
long_description: Menza is the AI data analyst for consumer brands. A brand like Hershey’s would connect all of their data sources and then we give them an AI analyst that works 24/7 looking for revenue opportunities, cost leaks, trends and anomalies.

name: FleetWorks
one_liner: AI enabled marketplace matching trucks with jobs
long_description:
FleetWorks is rebuilding the $1 trillion freight marketplace with AI.

Every year, companies spend over a trillion dollars moving freight across the U.S. — but the system for matching trucks with jobs is still slow, manual, and fragmented.

FleetWorks is fixing that. We’re turning today’s chaotic freight market into a modern, intelligent marketplace — one where AI agents replace the endless phone calls, texts and emails and match jobs to trucks instantly.

name: Chow Central Inc
one_liner: Asset Light Chipotle for Africa
long_description:
Chow Central is building technology to disrupt the food industry in Nigeria. The goal is to profitably provide food to as many people as possible in record time. 

Chow Central has launched its first product "500chow". A delivery-only quick service restaurant that serves customers in record time. 500chow has 10x lower costs than traditional brick-and-mortar restaurants, and 10x more online orders. 

Our customers love us for our super fast and cheaper deliveries. We are able to do this by launching hyper-locally within a 3km radius.

We are very focused on solving real problems in the food industry one scalable product at a time.

name: Repaint
one_liner: Build a website by chatting with AI
long_description: Repaint lets you build professional websites by chatting with AI. It interviews you, researches you online, and generates a custom websites. Then you can edit anything by asking the AI. Our vision is to merge traditional website builders with AI coding tools, creating a new way for anyone to make more advanced software.

name: Margin
one_liner: POS & operating system that makes liquor stores more money
long_description: Margin is empowering beer, wine & liquor stores with amazing technology. We bring enterprise-level sophistication to liquor retailers, giving them one integrated operating system for every part of their business. We increase profits for liquor stores who have been underserved by technology.

name: Dialtone
one_liner: AI Agents for Enterprises
long_description: Connect agentic workflows to all your existing software and data. 100+ first party data, action, and event connectors for the tools and services you already use. Easily configurable custom connectors for your enterprise’s proprietary systems, enterprise grade security, and dedicated infrastructure.

name: Hiro
one_liner: Your first security hire

name: Cardinal Gray
one_liner: Automating lenders' interactions with the DMV
long_description: When a lender gives out a car loan, they need to file a lien with their borrower’s DMV. This is difficult because the process varies by state and county. We’ve leveraged LLMs to help lenders automate lien filings for over $1B of loans.

name: Skyvern
one_liner: Open Source AI Agent to automate browser workflows via an API
long_description:
Skyvern helps companies automate browser based workflows using LLMs and Computer Vision, fully automating manual workflows and replacing brittle or unreliable scripts.

Examples include:
1. Automating materials procurement from commerce websites
2. Completing complex multi-step workflows (ie getting an insurance quote from Geico.com)
3. Automatically logging into portals and downloading invoices
4. Navigating legacy content systems to do data extraction or data entry

name: Decoda Health
one_liner: The all-in-one EMR built for med spas and elective care
long_description:
Med spas, wellness clinics, and aesthetics practices run on 5-10 disconnected tools — separate systems for scheduling, charting, payments, patient communication, and more. It's expensive, error-prone, and holds teams back.

Decoda is the all-in-one EMR and practice management platform purpose-built for elective care. AI is woven into every workflow — from an AI front desk that answers calls and books patients 24/7, to an ambient scribe that generates clinical notes in real time, to automated patient follow-ups that keep calendars full. Scheduling, payments, memberships, inventory, and analytics all live in one place.

Live in 150+ clinics, processing $100M+ in annual transactions.

name: Numen
one_liner: Engineering a future without cancer deaths.

name: VetRec
one_liner: AI Scribe for veterinarians. Saving time and improving patient care.
long_description: VetRec automates the process of taking clinical notes for veterinarians in a matter of seconds. Veterinarians should just review clinical notes, not spend time creating them. A visit with a pet is precious and 100% of the focus should be spent on the pet, not on notes. VetRec is the veterinarian's best friend.

name: GovernGPT
one_liner: The RFP Platform Asset Managers Adopt
long_description:
For money managers to raise their next billion, they dedicate entire teams to spend days filling diligence questionnaires with recycled content. We do it in minutes using AI.
Clients include Bridgewater, Pantheon, Coatue, Onex, Urban Partners, Yarra Capital, Axonic, NIAM, Raith Capital, Intl Farming, Hillsdale, White Oak, etc.

name: Maintouch
one_liner: Drive leads with SEO and AEO.
long_description: We're the ONLY platform to help you rank on both SEO and AI Search (AEO/GEO). I grew up working at my family's 9-figure SEO agency and learned how to automate everything. That's what we do for people now.

name: Epsilla
one_liner: All-in-one platform to create AI agents with your private knowledge
long_description: Epsilla is an all-in-one platform for building AI agents powered by your private data and knowledge. Easy to use for domain professionals, deeply customizable for AI experts, and fully equipped for enterprise customers with security, scalability, and integration.

name: refine
one_liner: Open-source Retool for enterprise
long_description:
refine is an open-source, headless React framework for rapidly building enterprise web applications. It eliminates many repetitive tasks like

➡️ CRUD operations
➡️ State management
➡️ Routing
➡️ Authentication
➡️ Access Control
➡️ i18n

and saves days of development time.

So far, thousands of great projects have been built by 15,000+ monthly active refine developers. Use cases are ranging from admin panels, dashboards, and internal tools to B2B solutions and complex SaaS interfaces. 

refine is backed by a strong community featuring 16K GitHub stars ⭐️, 180+ contributors and 2,500 Discord members. 

Thanks to it's unique "Headless UI" approach, refine works with any custom design. It has also ready-made integrations with 4 most popular UI frameworks: Ant Design, Material UI, Chakra UI and Mantine. refine is totally backend agnostic and it can connect to 15+ backend services out-of-the-box, incl. custom REST & GraphQL API's.

With refine, developers always have 100% control over their projects as they build, style and deploy the way they like.

name: CandorIQ
one_liner: Headcount & Compensation Management
long_description:
CandorIQ is software to manage Headcount and Compensation planning. Employees are +70% of all OPEX and yet still managed in sheets & email. We manage all people spend in 1 platform, integrated into your Finance & HR stack.

Product capabilities include:
- Headcount & backfill planning
- Headcount budget scenarios across departments
- Merit cycle planning
- Analytics including employee churn, hiring win/loss, cash burn

name: Surface Labs
one_liner: Building the AI-powered marketing ops platform that turns website…
long_description:
Surface Labs helps B2B companies capture, qualify, and convert inbound leads through intelligent contact forms. We replace tools like HubSpot Forms, Zapier, and Chili Piper with a single platform that embeds on any site with one line of code.

Our AI agents handle lead capture, enrichment, routing, follow-up, and CRO testing — automating what used to require full marketing ops teams. Customers see a 30% lift in conversions in under 2 weeks, and our partial response capture feature collects 50% more emails from form drop-offs.

name: Maven Bio
one_liner: The AI Platform for Life Sciences Intelligence
long_description:
Maven Bio is a 10-person seed-stage team in Boston building the market intelligence layer for life sciences AI. Three of the top 10 pharma companies are onboarded, and we have 20+ enterprise accounts across pharma, consulting, and investing. Customers report a 40% reduction in low-level analytical work.

We are growing fast and heading for a Series A. Our buyers are senior BD, CI, Strategy, and Investing leaders.

name: Upstream
one_liner: The first inbox designed for humans and agents
long_description: Your inbox, handled for you. Upstream's agents sort the noise, draft replies in your exact voice, follow up at the right time, and do what you ask - like finding receipts or scheduling meetings - so you can fly through your inbox and have fun doing it.

name: Metalware
one_liner: Firmware cybersecurity
long_description:
Metalware develops advanced firmware security solutions for critical infrastructure, protecting industries like aerospace, defense, automotive, telecom, and healthcare from cyber threats.

Our product is an automated, intelligent binary fuzzer that enables organizations to efficiently discover and remediate security weaknesses in hardware products before deployment.

name: MediSearch
one_liner: Search engine for trustworthy medical information.
long_description: MediSearch gives direct answers to medical questions based on trustworthy sources.

name: Bretton AI
one_liner: AI-native operations for the banks
long_description:
Bretton runs AI-native operations for the financial back office. OCC, Fed and FDIC regulated banks use Bretton to run compliance, risk, fraud operations on one platform, on their own data and policies, with every output traced, cited, and audit-ready.

Bretton has pioneered AI use in financial services with its proprietary Trust Infrastructure — a system of model validation, governance and auditability guardrails that enables AI use in key regulated workflows.

name: Midrender
one_liner: Turn product features into launch videos
long_description: Midrender is a visual editor for creating motion graphics, powered by AI. Point the agent at your codebase, it reads your code, understands the feature, and creates an animated walkthrough you can ship. A full timeline and design editor lets you fine-tune every detail.

name: AgentCollect
one_liner: B2B debt collection powered by AI agents
long_description:
We recover aged B2B debt in weeks, not quarters: ~49% in 20 days vs ~20% in 4-6 months for traditional agencies.
Our AI agents call, email, text, find the right contact (20% of B2B contact data is outdated), and negotiate payment plans 24/7 ; all under your brand. 
We replace your offshore BPO and third-party agencies. 
Your AR team stays focused on strategic accounts.

Live with Dell, Microsoft, FedEx, Plaid, and Checkr and hundreds of enterprise companies.

Long-tail AR your team has deprioritized becomes recovered cash before a traditional agency even gets moving.

name: Aglide
one_liner: Connect every disconnected app to your SSO.
long_description:
Our mission is to secure access to every enterprise application.

Aglide SSO lets security and IT teams connect non-standard and legacy apps - from banking portals to social media logins - directly to their existing identity provider (Okta, Entra, OneLogin, Ping, etc.), with no need for app-side integration.

Once connected, these apps behave like any other IdP-managed service: policies like MFA, Conditional Access, RBAC, and audit logging just work, and end users access them through SSO only.

Customers use Aglide to secure both individual apps (e.g., legacy banking portals, Discord, Squarespace) and sensitive shared accounts (e.g., AWS root, social media). Our agentic identity technology means Aglide works with any app out of the box - no integration catalog, no custom scripting.

Today, companies from public fintechs like Gemini to media companies like The Motley Fool rely on Aglide’s zero-trust, end-to-end encrypted platform to complete their identity stack.

name: Fortuna Health
one_liner: TurboTax for Medicaid
long_description:
Fortuna is a one-stop solution that helps consumers navigate Medicaid end-to-end from eligibility and enrollment to renewing coverage. 

Our platform creates value as the middleware layer for the $800B Medicaid ecosystem.

name: Empirical Health
one_liner: Don't die of heart disease. Empirical is the first AI-native heart…
long_description:
Don't die of heart disease. While heart disease is the #1 killer worldwide, 80% of heart disease is preventable.

Empirical's program starts with an advanced lab test with 100+ biomarkers, including ApoB, Lp(a), inflammation, and more. Then, we help you model your lifetime risk of heart disease and generate a plan to reduce your risk to an optimal level. Then we help you achieve that plan.

Empirical is licensed, registered, and insured to deliver real medical care in 30+ US states covering 200m+ people. We're growing >25% monthly.

name: LifestyleRx
one_liner: Virtual Care for Type 2 Diabetes Reversal
long_description: LifestyleRx delivers insurance-covered virtual care for Type 2 Diabetes reversal.  Our doctors guide patients through lifestyle changes to reverse the underlying process of diabetes.
locations: White Rock, BC, Canada; St. Thomas, ON, Canada; Remote

name: Glade
one_liner: Build games at the speed of thought
long_description: Glade is helping everyone build games with AI. GladeCore powers hundreds of studios and developers with locally powered AI NPCs that include TTS, STT, emotional tuning, and RAG. GladeKit is Cursor for Games - an AI agent that lives directly in your game engine and builds games for you.

name: CareOasis
one_liner: Get Paid for Family Caregiving

name: Guac
one_liner: AI-powered forecasting & replenishment for grocery
long_description: Guac accurately forecasts grocery demand to help supermarkets order and produce the right amount of inventory — reducing food waste and increasing availability.

name: Letter AI
one_liner: Empowering B2B sellers with AI-powered training, coaching, and content
long_description: Letter AI is the world's first generative AI powered revenue acceleration platform. Build and maintain all the collateral and training you need 10x faster with generative AI. Personalize instantly by vertical or individual customers using existing data. Ask questions in real-time to your own co-pilot with expertise in your data. Scale coaching with realistic and hyper-personalized AI roleplay. Reach out to learn more about how both large enterprise like Lenovo and Adobe and growing startups like Paro and DealerBuilt are delivering real value for their revenue teams using the Letter AI platform.

name: Rimward
one_liner: Low-false-positive intrusion detection for remote outdoor sites
long_description:
Rimward helps operators of solar farms and other remote outdoor infrastructure detect intrusions from existing camera networks. We turn existing CCTV into operator-ready alerts with video verification, so security teams can reduce false alarms, respond faster, and avoid heavy hardware retrofits.

We are focused on sites where recurring theft, perimeter intrusion, and low staffing make traditional monitoring noisy and operationally weak. Our approach is software-heavy, field-oriented, and built to work with real site constraints.

name: sizeless
one_liner: Instant 3D Digital Twins for Smarter Real Estate.
long_description: Make data-driven decisions. Optimize property management. With the property Digital Twin from sizeless, you can access highly accurate data to understand your property's details, make informed decisions on inspections, and work on the required management optimization measures.

name: Apoxy
one_liner: Simpler and cheaper multi-cloud and cross-platform deployments.
long_description: Apoxy is the programmable edge platform that simplifies connectivity, security, and custom logic deployment for distributed applications. Our platform combines secure site-to-site networking with a high-performance runtime for custom TypeScript and Go filters, allowing developers to deploy business logic at the edge without complex infrastructure. Whether you need instant HTTP/TCP/UDP connectivity, advanced access controls, or custom data processing, Apoxy meets you where you are - from Kubernetes clusters to simple processes - with powerful observability and sub-second troubleshooting built in.

name: Yenmo
one_liner: Secured consumer lending in India
long_description:
Yenmo offers a better way to access cash for India’s 65 million investors who either resort to personal loans at over 18% interest or have to liquidate their investments when in need of money. With Yenmo, they can pledge their investments digitally and instantly get a loan at a fixed 10.5% interest rate.

Our Insight - In India, over 30% of personal loan borrowers have active investments and are paying double the interest rate they qualify for with us.

name: Trainy
one_liner: Infrastructure for managing GPU clusters for training/serving.
long_description:
Goodbye Slurm, Hello Konduktor.

Trainy Konduktor is a software platform for AI teams to schedule workloads with priority, control resource allocation, and improve GPU reliability. With Konduktor, teams submit jobs to a healthy pool of GPUs, assign job priority with a simple user interface, and never worry about hardware faults again.

name: Studdy
one_liner: An AI math tutor for every student
long_description:
At Studdy, our mission is to unlock the full potential of the next generation by providing a personalized AI tutor for every student.

Studdy Buddy is a multilingual tutor that uses AI, as well as advanced speech, text, and image recognition technology to supercharge students' ability to learn new subjects.

We believe that making self-learning as easy as possible for as many students as possible (no matter their cultural, social, or educational background) is the key to unlocking the full potential of students around the world.

We're a passionate team of AI experts, educators, and builders - if you also have a passion for transforming education we'd love to hear from you.

Shoot us a message at team@studdy.ai!

name: Kobalt Labs
one_liner: AI-powered risk and compliance for financial institutions
long_description:
Automate and strengthen manual risk and compliance operations for fintechs and banks. Given a third party contracts and documentation, Kobalt’s reasoning engine ingests internal policies and procedures, legal commitments, past privacy and compliance assessments, and syncs with external legislation to instantly auto-surface and track risks.

We're helping community/regional/sponsor banks increase revenue and scale their partnership and vendor volume, and we're helping fintechs conduct their partner diligence in 1/10 the time, all without needing to increase headcount.

name: Gleam
one_liner: Automating Data Entry for Clinical Trials
long_description: Gleam automates data entry for clinical research sites.

name: Bolto
one_liner: AI Powered All-In-One Payroll, HR + Recruiting
long_description: AI-powered recruiting and HR platform. Find and hire the best pre-vetted global software talent and simplify onboarding, payroll, and compliance.

name: VaultPay
one_liner: Digital banking platform for the 30 million smartphone users in DRC.
long_description: Vaultpay is building a digital banking platform for 30 million smartphone users in DRC and the country's largest agent network. For example, a young Congolese entrepreneur who just won a subcontract with a major mining company can now easily open a personal and business account, receive payments, all from their smartphone, instead of spending hours at bank branches.
locations: Kinshasa, Kinshasa, Democratic Republic of the Congo

name: Khoj
one_liner: AI for humans
long_description: Khoj is an applied artificial intelligence company. We're a tiny team of hackers doing applied research and building safe, useful ai software for humans.

name: Slicker
one_liner: Recover payment failures and maximize subscription Revenue
long_description: Slicker eliminates involuntary churn through AI-powered retries, tailored for your business. Our proprietary engine automatically monitors, detects, and recovers failed recurring payments, so you can convert past due invoices into revenue.

name: Osium AI
one_liner: Speed up materials innovation with Artificial Intelligence
long_description:
Our AI-powered software enables materials R&D engineers to design new materials much faster. 

To date, manufacturing companies rely on trial-and-error and manual approaches to develop new materials. This is a tedious and time-consuming process. Yet, carbon neutrality requirements urge manufacturers to adopt greener and lighter materials to decarbonize the industry.

name: CambioML
one_liner: AI Teammate to Enable Every Knowledge Worker to Be a Top Performer
long_description: Energent.ai turns every knowledge worker into a top performer by pairing them with an AI teammate. We streamline manual workflows without integrations, democratize automation with zero code, and move beyond passive chatbots to deliver real, visible output — all securely within the enterprise environment.

name: Flint
one_liner: Personalized learning built for schools
long_description:
Flint is an AI-powered personalized learning platform for K-12 schools, helping teachers deliver individualized instruction at scale. Trusted by 500,000+ educators and students, Flint has powered learning activities that increase student engagement, academic performance, and collaboration.

Through AI-driven tutoring, real-time feedback, and interactive learning experiences, Flint enables every student to receive personalized support without adding to teacher workload.

With AI-native student analytics, educators gain full visibility into student progress, strengths, and areas for improvement, while saving time on grading, lesson planning, and differentiation. Students receive a 24/7 AI tutor that adapts to their level without giving away answers, supporting deeper understanding and independent thinking.

For schools and districts, Flint provides robust AI guardrails, including customizable moderation, grade-level controls, and full transparency into student usage, ensuring safe and responsible AI adoption.

name: Converge
one_liner: All-in-one marketing measurement for B2C
long_description:
We're building the unified marketing measurement stack for online stores. We make it easy for marketeers to understand where their customers come from, cut unprofitable channels, and scale when things are working.

We are vertically integrating the modern data stack for marketing teams of online stores by consolidating customer data collection, consent management, identity resolution, transformations, attribution, data forwarding, and analytics into a single platform.

name: Inlet
one_liner: AI timekeeping for legal professionals.
long_description:
Attorneys at small- and medium-sized law firms juggle dozens of matters, context-switching throughout the day – and often failing to record their billable time for every task they worked on.

Inlet records these tasks automatically – eliminating painful admin time and increasing their revenue.

name: Rankai
one_liner: RankAI grows your website on autopilot
long_description:
Websites used to be static billboards, passive and waiting to be found.  

RankAI helps startups and agencies grow websites on autopilot. It learns from your site, market, competitors, and performance data to identify which pages should exist, creates them in your brand, publishes them directly to your live website, and continuously improves them based on real traffic and conversion — so your website gets discovered, trusted, and converted on by both human and Agents.

name: Sola
one_liner: Copilot for Robotic Process Automation
long_description:
Sola is copilot for workflow automation. 

We help automation-minded teams build robust robotic agents to handle tedious tasks via LLMs and computer vision, smoothly integrated into their standard workflow. 

Our tooling makes it easy for companies to automate data entry/scraping in manual filing and processing flows. Go from a screen recording to a bot in any desktop or browser workflow; develop logic and watch logic self-develop in the face of new events!

name: Read Bean
one_liner: Learn language with real-world content, at your level
long_description: Read Bean helps intermediate-advanced language learners and heritage speakers improve their literacy using real-world content. The app measures your initial reading level and automatically transforms texts into bite-sized lessons at your level. It adapts to your progress, reinforcing vocabulary and tailoring content to ensure continuous improvement.

name: Automorphic
one_liner: Infuse knowledge into language models with just 10 samples
long_description: Automorphic has invented a way to infuse knowledge into LLMs via fine-tuning (surpassing context window limitations), enabling developers to rapidly iterate on and successively improve custom models cheaply and efficiently.

name: Baserun
one_liner: Observability and evaluation platform for LLM apps.
long_description: LLMs are incredibly powerful, but latency, cost, and unpredictable outputs have made productionizing LLM features challenging. Baserun is a testing and observability platform that helps AI teams streamline their development cycle from identifying an issue to evaluating their solution, so that teams ship faster with confidence.

name: SafetyKit
one_liner: AI agents for risk, compliance, and safety
long_description:
SafetyKit's AI agents do the dirty work for big tech and finance companies so humans don't have to.

Today companies rely on armies of low-paid outsourced humans to protect their platforms from fraud, harassment, and crime. It’s super important work, but the jobs are difficult and sometimes traumatizing, and it’s impossible to keep up. Our mission is to end this manual toil.

We learned this domain first-hand at Stripe and Airbnb, where first we built software for human reviewers, and then built models to replace them.

We’re a group of engineers from Stripe, Meta, Netflix, MIT, and Princeton that love language models and unironically love B2B SaaS. We know the economy is going to be rearranged over the next 4 years and we want to be in the driver’s seat.

We build vertical AI that works and have some of the world’s largest companies as paying customers. Patreon, Eventbrite, Upwork, Character.ai, Substack, Faire, along with a $10B+ marketplace, a $100B+ payments company, and more rely on SafetyKit in production.

name: VectorShift
one_liner: AI Operating System for Private Market Investors
long_description: VectorShift is the AI operating system for private market investors.VectorShift is the AI operating system for private market investors. We capture a firm's institutional knowledge across every deal, decision, and diligence finding, and put it to work across data room analysis, IC memos, portfolio company monitoring, and LP reporting.

name: Envelope
one_liner: Budgeting app with built-in banking
long_description: Envelope is a budgeting app with built-in checking and debit cards. It helps people organize real money into digital envelopes, plan ahead for bills and everyday spending, and control spending before it happens, instead of only tracking transactions after the money is gone.

name: DisputeNinja
one_liner: Automate your chargebacks with AI agents
long_description: DisputeNinja helps software and AI startups automate their chargebacks and recover revenue.

name: Roundtable
one_liner: Proof of Human - invisible human verification
long_description:
Roundtable Proof of Human is an API that invisibly detects bots and verifies human identity.

Founded by 2 Princeton cognitive scientists, Roundtable leverages world-class research with enterprise-grade accuracy and latency so websites can verify their human users friction-free.

name: Andromeda Surgical
one_liner: Autonomous surgical robots
long_description: We're building autonomous robots to make surgery safe, easier and more efficient. Robots currently perform about 1/4 of surgeries but only help with the physical aspects. We use AI to make surgery cognitively easier. This has far greater potential to improve outcomes and reduce costs. Founded by 3x founders from medtech and autonomous vehicles, we're on track to be the fastest surgical robot to market of all time. First indication is prostate enucleation.

name: Silimate
one_liner: The copilot for chip designers
long_description:
We're building AI-native core tools & agent-driven workflows for frontend chip design. 

Today, Silimate is helping Fortune 500s and chip unicorns create & iterate to correct, optimized designs 40x faster. Our goal is to enable autonomous spec-to-design for silicon.

name: Sweep
one_liner: The best AI coding assistant for JetBrains
long_description: Use your favorite JetBrains IDE without compromising on AI. Sweep is the best autocomplete and agent in JetBrains: https://plugins.jetbrains.com/plugin/26860-sweep-ai

name: sudocode
one_liner: orchestrate your coding agents with sudocode
long_description:
sudocode automates the logistics of managing context windows and orchestrating agents so you can direct the work instead of babysitting agents.

Fully open-source. Try it at sudocode.ai or https://github.com/sudocode-ai/sudocode

name: Sendblue
one_liner: iMessage for Sales
long_description: Sendblue provides businesses with virtual iMessage lines to text prospects and nurture leads. Our users on average see a 70% increase in response rate. The company is founded by Rob Haber, former ML Engineer at Scale AI, and Alex Luis, former PM at PwC's telecom practice.

name: SyntheticFi
one_liner: Low cost securities-backed lending for financial advisors and HNWI
long_description: SyntheticFi offers a low-cost and low-hassle solution for independent financial advisors (RIAs) to meet the liquidity needs of their clients.

name: Inventive AI
one_liner: AI Agents For RFP and Questionnaire Response Automation
long_description:
Inventive is an AI-powered RFP & questionnaire response management platform that drives 70%+ efficiency in sales response workflows.

**Core benefits and features:**

- **10X Faster Drafts With Highly Accurate Responses**: Using Inventive’s proprietary AI-system you can get first drafts 10 times faster, with accurate responses rooted in your knowledge sources, that you and your team can collaborate on to refine.
- **Single Hub for All Your Knowledge Sources:** Inventive offers a centralized hub for all your knowledge sources. You can upload previous RFPs and relevant documents; integrate with your internal data systems such as gDrive. Sharepoint & more; upload Q&A from legacy tools or spreadsheets; and even add information from your websites.
- **Fight Stale Content With AI Content Manager:** Inventive’s AI content manager proactively flags conflicting content by identifying issues within your sources, so you only use fresh and relevant content in your responses.
- **Higher Productivity & Competitive Advantage With AI Agents:** Inventive offers a suite of AI agents designed to boost productivity and give you a competitive advantage. These agents can help with researching competitors, brainstorming ideas, and more.

Built by a customer-obsessed team comprising an ex-exec from a Fortune 500 company and ex-AI team from Google & Stanford. Backed by top Silicon Valley investors including YCombinator.

name: Langdock
one_liner: The all-in-one AI platform for companies.
long_description: Langdock is a comprehensive and secure platform for deploying AI in companies. From a powerful chat interface for all employees to tools for creating custom workflow automations with AI-driven agents.

name: Santé
one_liner: All-in-one POS for liquor stores

name: Elythea
one_liner: ML to predict and prevent pregnancy complications
long_description:
Over 80% of maternal mortalities were preventable with earlier intervention. Currently, doctors miss >50% of moms who have life-threatening complications and wait until labor to start doing manual risk assessments, at which point it's too late.

Elythea's proprietary ML models catch life-threatening obstetric complications (like postpartum hemorrhage, preeclampsia/eclampsia, emergency c-section, preterm labor, and more) as soon as the first visit. We automatically analyze relevant demographic and clinical risk factors, flag high-risk patients, and provide evidence-based interventions, giving doctors months in advance to intervene and prevent complications from ever happening.

Our global clinical studies have shown that we can catch 3x more complications than clinical judgment 10x sooner.

name: Nanograb
one_liner: Deliver genes to any cell with AI
long_description: Nanograb is a computational drug discovery company that uses AI to create novel targeted non-viral gene therapy vectors. Our platform designs unique combinations of small peptide binders attached to nanoparticles to safely deliver genetic medicines to specific cells and tissues in the body at scale.

name: Pure
one_liner: Marketplace for Rare Coins & Precious Metals
long_description: Pure is the first transparent marketplace for the $11B Rare Coins Sector & $55B Precious Metals sector. We make it easy to buy & sell authenticated rare coins and precious metals such as Gold, Silver, Platinum, Palladium & Rhodium.

name: HappyRobot
one_liner: Intelligence that runs your operations.
long_description: HappyRobot is the AI-native operating system for the real economy, closing the circuit between intelligence and action. By combining real-time truth, specialized AI workers, and an orchestrating intelligence, HappyRobot manages complex, mission-critical work with true autonomy. Acting as a central brain, the OS compounds intelligence over time, optimizes decisions at every level, and continuously improves as it operates. Starting with supply chain and industrial-scale operations, HappyRobot enables enterprises to run with greater resilience and speed, while humans focus on strategy, creativity, and values.

name: Cedalio
one_liner: AI agents that automate AP, procurement, and finance
long_description: Cedalio is the AI agent platform for the Office of the CFO. We automate procurement, AP, and the data flows behind them — from invoice intake to 3-way match to payment — so finance teams stop doing the work and start governing it.

name: Certainly Health
one_liner: Marketplace to book doctors and avoid surprise bills
long_description: Patients enter their insurance and visit reason, and we use machine learning to predict and guarantee their out-of-pocket costs for every health provider.  For health providers, we ensure their patients always pay the bill.

name: Terracotta AI
one_liner: AI-powered Infrastructure as Code PR reviews
long_description:
Terracotta AI is an AI-powered Infrastructure as Code PR reviewer for Terraform, OpenTofu, and CDK-TF code, making Infrastructure as Code changes more transparent, less risky, and faster.

Terracotta stops your Infrastructure as Code deployments from becoming ticking time bombs every time you modify your environment with AI-driven, contextual feedback delivered directly to your pull requests.

name: Fiber AI
one_liner: The freshest data APIs for AI sales, recruiting, & growth products
long_description:
Fiber AI is the freshest data APIs for AI sales, recruiting, & growth products, with the freshest data on 40M+ companies, 850M+ people, and 30M+ jobs.

You can search live company, people, and jobs data via APIs and webhooks for 10x cheaper than People Data Labs, Explorium, Cognism, CoreSignal, and others. We have verified emails and phone numbers for 4x cheaper than Clay, Apollo, and ZoomInfo.

We've helped enterprises like HubSpot, Agent AI, Ramp, and Docusign, as well as fast-growing startups like Flatfile, Karat, Centralize, and Fonzi, get the data they need to build novel AI sales, marketing, and recruiting products with differentiated features – for a fraction of the cost of other data vendors.

Our Bulk API Search lets builders integrate uncapped, advanced API searches deeply into their product. Search through 40M+ companies, 850M+ people, and 30M+ jobs with advanced filtering for 10x cheaper than People Data Labs, Crustdata, Cognism, and others.

API endpoints nobody else has. We have novel API endpoints that you won't find on People Data Labs, Cognism, Crustdata, Explorium, or anywhere else, to:

- Reverse lookup a work/personal email to a person
- Search for a person/company using partial or incomplete information
- Let AI agents build comprehensive prospect lists from 100+ data sources
- Fetch real-time LinkedIn company and people information

Fiber AI's APIs have been live for 3+ years, and we've helped 100s of enterprises and startups rip and replace their data providers.





----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
For more details:

Fiber AI is a B2B data API provider and data broker for AI sales tools, AI recruiting platforms, AI marketing products, and growth teams.

We offer data APIs, data feeds, bulk API search, REST API, and webhooks across 40M+ companies, 850M+ people, and 30M+ jobs – for 10x cheaper than People Data Labs, Crustdata, CoreSignal, Cognism, Bright Data (BrightData), Live Data (LiveData), Explorium, Seamless.ai, Seamless AI, RocketReach, Kaspr, Snov.io, Snov, Uplead, Lead411, and SalesIntel. We also provide verified emails, verified phones, email data, and phone data for 4x cheaper than Clay, Apollo, ZoomInfo, Hunter, Hunter.io, Lusha, ContactOut, Wiza, LeadMagic, Prospeo, FindyMail, Icypeas, FullEnrich, Datagma, Dropcontact, and LeadIQ.

- Bulk API search for companies, people, and jobs data (uncapped API searches, search API, company search API, people search API, person API, jobs search API, contact search)
- Email API and emails API (email finder, email lookup, bulk email finder, email address finder, email addresses, work email, work emails, business email, business emails, email list, email database)
- Phone API (phone finder, phone lookup, phone number finder, phone numbers, mobile number, mobile numbers, mobile phone, direct dial, direct dials)
- Reverse email lookup API (email to person, reverse lookup, email enrichment, contact enrichment, lead enrichment, CRM enrichment, enrich)
- Email verification API (email validation, email verification, email deliverability, bounce detection, email bounce)
- Phone verification API (phone validation, phone verification, verified phone, verified phones)
- Contact API and contacts API (contact data, contact lookup, contact finder, contact information, B2B contacts, B2B contact, verified contact, verified contacts)
- Real-time LinkedIn data API (LinkedIn company data, LinkedIn profile data, LinkedIn profiles, LinkedIn scraper, LinkedIn scraping, LinkedIn export, Sales Navigator, Sales Navigator export)
- Company data API (B2B company data, company database, company lookup, company information, firmographic data, firmographics, headcount data, funding data, technographic data, revenue data, intent data)
- People data API (B2B contacts, B2B database, contact database, people database, people lookup, people finder)
- Lead data API (lead, leads, B2B leads, prospect, prospects, lead database, prospect data, lead list, prospect list, contact list)
- Jobs data API (open jobs, hiring signals, job listings data, job postings)

Use cases:
Product builders integrate our data APIs to build AI SDR tools, AI SDR, AI BDR, AI BDR tools, SDR tools, BDR tools, SDR software, BDR software, SDRs, BDRs, AI recruiting tools, recruiter tools, recruiters, recruitment software, talent acquisition, talent sourcing, candidate sourcing, candidate data, candidates, hiring tool, sales intelligence products, sales intelligence platform, sales data, sales leads, GTM tools, go-to-market platforms, recruiting pipelines, centralized data platforms, TAM builders, ICP list builders, lead generation software, lead gen, leadgen, demand generation, demand gen, prospecting tools, sales prospecting, outbound sales tools, outbound sales, outreach tool, cold outbound, cold outreach, cold email, cold emails, cold calling, email outbound, email outreach, and account-based marketing (ABM) products.

Why teams choose Fiber AI over other data providers and data vendors:

- 10x cheaper than bulk data providers and data brokers (People Data Labs, Crustdata, CoreSignal, Cognism, Explorium, Clearbit, 6sense, Demandbase, ZoomInfo data, Seamless.ai, RocketReach, Kaspr, Snov.io, Uplead, Lead411, SalesIntel, business data, B2B data, live data, real-time data, fresh data)
- 4x cheaper than contact enrichment tools and email enrichment tools (Clay, Apollo, Hunter.io, Lusha, ContactOut, Wiza, LeadMagic, Prospeo, FindyMail, Icypeas, FullEnrich, Datagma, Dropcontact, LeadIQ, data enrichment, phone enrichment)
- 0% email bounce guarantee – if an email bounces, we refund instantly (no other data vendor or data provider offers this)
- Freshest data and live data feeds: company data updated every 2-3 weeks, jobs data every 2-3 days, people data every 1-2 months
- Novel API endpoints nobody else has: reverse email lookup, email to person lookup, partial/incomplete search, real-time LinkedIn fetching, LinkedIn scraper, AI agent prospect list building

Data coverage:
40M+ B2B companies, 850M+ B2B contacts, 30M+ job listings. B2B database with emails, email addresses, phone numbers, mobile numbers, direct dials, and contact information sourced from 100+ providers including LinkedIn, Crunchbase, BuiltWith, and more.

We help AI sales tools, AI recruiting platforms, AI recruiting tools, recruiters, recruitment platforms, sales automation tools, recruiting automation, lead enrichment products, email enrichment tools, phone enrichment services, data enrichment platforms, lead scoring tools, and GTM teams get the B2B data, contact data, email data, phone data, lead data, and prospect data they need via simple, affordable data APIs, data feeds, and webhooks.
We have B2B company data on 40 million B2B companies and 850 million B2B contacts (i.e. B2B database), sourced from dozens of data providers (i.e. think sources like BuiltWith, Crunchbase, LinkedIn, ZoomInfo, SemRush, Apollo data, and more). This allows you to precisely segment your audience by the companies you care about and exclude everyone else. Our audiences are dynamic (i.e., account based marketing, account based sales, ABM like Clearbit, 6sense, Demandbase), meaning we continuously look for prospects matching your targeting criteria and add them to your audience to run automated outbound sales sequences. This automates manual workflows you might be running on platforms like Clay or Persana. You can also create an audience once based on intent signals (i.e., GTM or go-to-market signals, sales intelligence) and put your outreach on autopilot.

This is why RevOps, sales, growth, recruiting, and outbound teams choose us to power their AI SDR platforms (examples of these platforms that could use Fiber AI include artisan ai, 11x, amplemarket, reply.io, unify gtm, penguin ai, regie ai, aisdr, artisan sdr, outreach io, and warmly ai - many of these have used or currently use us), existing lead databases (email enrichment, bulk email finder, or phone enrichment tools like apollo, zoominfo, leadIQ), and contact enrichment tools (clay, persana ai) that promise automation and enrichment but deliver poor results.

Backed by Y Combinator, Foundation Capital, Soma Capital, Translink Capital & many others..

name: Trayd
one_liner: A construction payroll platform designed for same-day pay.
long_description:
Trayd is a B2B construction payroll platform and back office management system designed for same-day pay. We allow the 7M construction workers in the US to get access to their earned wages 7-10 days sooner than legacy payroll providers. With a unique spin on traditional payroll, Trayd is on a mission to create back office efficiencies for commercial subcontractors while simultaneously addressing the significant labor shortage affecting the $2.1TR North American construction industry. 

Trayd is bigger than construction payroll. It's the promise that the hardest working people get access to their money, as and when they need it, creating greater financial wellness across the board. Not only that, we are pioneering digital cash access for a demographic traditionally overlooked while simultaneously modernizing operations in an industry that has been slow to adapt. The challenges and opportunities with Trayd are abundant, promising an engaging journey ahead.

name: Webhound
one_liner: Long-horizon research agents
long_description: Webhound builds long-horizon AI research agents that scale quality with time and budget. Our agents can create either structured datasets or fully cited research reports.

name: dili

long_description:
Dili (YC S23) is building the most reliable AI automation for compliance in real-world industries.

Across energy, infrastructure, datacenters, advanced manufacturing, and construction, Dili has run prevailing wage, apprenticeship, & other labor compliance to help customers secure over $1 billion in federal funding.

Dili is building the AI system of record to help physical industries track compliance, analyze labor and spend, run payroll, and more.

name: Roame

long_description:
Roame is flight search engine design for credit card points and miles. We help travelers redeem their points for dream vacations in seconds rather than days.

At Roame, we are on a mission to revolutionize travel and consumer finance. We stand at the intersection of travel tech and fintech.

name: Cargo

long_description: We’re redefining how teams execute GTM by making them leaner, faster and engineer-driven. In an AI-first world, we’re replacing SDR-heavy models with a hybrid approach, empowering full-cycle AEs through a blend of manual effort and automation.

name: Inconvo

long_description:
Inconvo is the open-source platform for building data agents on production data. With safe queries, permissions, and structured outputs.

Use Inconvo to build and deploy data agents that query production databases and can be called directly from your application. You get safe query execution, permissions, stateful conversations, and observability out of the box.

Shadeform has a unified, easy-to-use API and platform to access and provision GPUs and deploy models for inference to any provider. With our aggregated availability and pricing data, we can help ensure your on-demand inference and training jobs will run on time at optimal cost.

long_description: Affinity is a compliance training platform designed specifically for regulated industries. name: Giga
one_liner: AI Support Agent for Enterprises.

long_description:
AiSDR automates sales prospecting. Our software uses AI to automatically write and send sales emails, once a prospective customer engages – we then automatically correspond and book meetings with them. 

AiSDR's sales emails have an average response rate of 7.1%, which is already on par with the industry response rate from emails written by humans. 

We are aiming to replace over 600k SDRs, that cost US companies $48B a year.

name: Nowadays
one_liner: AI-native platform for corporate meetings and events
long_description:
Nowadays is the AI-native platform for corporate meetings and events. Our AI doesn't just assist planners – it does the work. It emails and calls venues, negotiates rates in 22 languages, parses 50-page hotel proposals into clean apples-to-apples comparisons, and surfaces unmanaged meeting spend across your entire org.

We work with companies ranging from ones planning one epic company kickoff a year to ones running thousands of meetings through the platform annually. Clients include Google, Airbnb, BlackRock, Anthropic, Pylon, and Mintlify.

Unlike legacy platforms like Cvent that bolted AI onto decades-old infrastructure, Nowadays was built from the ground up for the AI era.

Specialized inference optimization for codegen

one_liner: Building the next Procore
long_description:
Constructable is the modern alternative to Procore, Autodesk, and Fieldwire. We help mid-size general contractors manage the entire lifecycle of a commercial project from bidding to closeout.

With Constructable, teams can accelerate field, project, and financial management in one intuitive system. RFIs, submittals, drawings, daily logs, punch lists, change orders—everything lives in one place, with AI-powered search to find answers instantly.

GCs and builders across the U.S. and Canada are already running smoother projects on Constructable.

Learn more at constructable.ai

name: Wattson Health
one_liner: AI Voice and SMS Agents for Healthcare
long_description: Wattson Health’s AI agents connect with customers over the phone and SMS. Give us your busiest tasks and we’ll train our agents to take them off your hands.

name: Glide
one_liner: Crypto Deposits, Wallet Funding, and Pay-with-crypto Infra
long_description: Glide lets apps accept crypto deposits from any chain, wallet, or exchange using pre-built wallet funding flows. Users can fund wallets directly — no bridges, no swaps, no repeated KYC.

name: truemetrics
one_liner: We show couriers where to park and enter a building.
long_description:
truemetrics helps logistics companies to find their customer's faster. By detecting and mapping entrances, we help GLS, a key logistics company in Europe, save 32.7 seconds on each delivery.

The way couriers navigate is broken.

“You Have Arrived At Your Destination!” — or so Google Maps thinks. In reality, the way couriers navigate is broken: No parking, hard-to-find entrances, and labyrinth-like apartment and office complexes can turn the last meters of delivery into a time-consuming puzzle.

truemetrics provides parking positions and entrance locations to enable faster drop-offs. Our data is generated by analyzing sensor data from drivers' smartphones, allowing truemetrics to identify precise parking and entrance locations, thereby simplifying the last meters of delivery.

name: Olio Labs
one_liner: Combination therapeutics for the world's toughest diseases
long_description: Olio labs uses AI to develop combination therapeutics that consider the thousands of interacting proteins in your body rather than targeting just one or two. Their lead combinations target obesity and are more effective with fewer side effects than Ozempic, the fastest growing drug of all time. Their custom ML built from real-world expertise and cutting edge AI searches trillions of combinations to find the perfect one.

name: Cognitio Labs
one_liner: AI back office for food product quality teams
long_description:
CoAsync by Cognitio Labs is the AI back office for product quality teams.

We help mission-critical food supply chains stay aligned across documents like CoAs, lab results, and supplier communication to ensure the highest-grade product quality and accuracy.

Backed by Y Combinator and leading investors. The organization is deeply aligned with the Sustainable Development Goals, having presented via the the World Economic Forum's SmartStart Initiative, and the International Telecommunication Union's AI for Good program in partnership with the United Nations.

We are starting with food and expanding into other regulated, high-risk supply chains.

Learn more at https://cognitioiq.com

name: Opensteer
one_liner: Specialized agents for real work
long_description: Opensteer creates specialized AI agents in cloud computers that can integrate with anything. Each agent gets customizable browser access, tools, instructions, and guardrails, so it can work 24/7 exactly the way you need.

name: Tempo

long_description: Tempo is a visual editor for react that gives PMs, designers, and engineers the ability to collaborate visually on code. It offers the familiar UX of a design tool but functions like an IDE under the hood. Tempo is optimized for Vite and Tailwind.

name: Cembla
one_liner: AI for legal & government

name: Coba
one_liner: Dual Currency Accounts For LatAm
long_description:
Coba makes it easy for Mexican knowledge workers employed by US companies to earn in US Dollars and seamlessly spend locally in Pesos.

On average, a knowledge worker will lose $1,000 per year in hidden ForEx and transfer fees. In that process, their money will touch at least 3 different accounts adding time and steps along the way. These workers’ require more than simple money movement, they demand a financial solution that addresses their specific needs: banking, saving, spending - all in two currencies.

Coba allows its users to not only deposit and save their earnings in a US account, but also access critical financial services at home in Mexico - from a local credit card to integrated bill pay. With Coba, remote workers can live across two currencies... efficiently and effortlessly.
locations: Monterrey, N.L., Mexico; Austin, TX, USA

name: jo
one_liner: The private AI that runs your life before you ask.
long_description: jo is a personal AI that runs on your Mac and a private cloud machine we host for you. It knows your life, improves itself autonomously, chats via Telegram and WhatsApp, and never shares your data. Less "chatbot" and more "a second brain that does things proactively".

name: Orbio Earth
one_liner: Tracking methane emissions with satellites
long_description:
Orbio uses satellite imagery to track methane emissions from the oil & gas industry. We sell the data to financial companies that want to invest into the best performing energy companies.

Until today, oil & gas companies use excel-based emission factors to calculate and report their emissions. As these excel-based emission factors underestimate actual emissions by ~70%, the finance companies that invest into oil & gas can’t mitigate against incoming risks from new regulations, 

We have built a technology that can for the first time use satellite images to track methane from every single oil & gas facility on the planet, replacing emission factors and allowing finance companies to make the best bets on oil & gas companies that will withstand a wide avalanche of incoming regulation. In the summer 2023 our satellite-based technology got ranked #1 both in terms of accuracy and sensitivity of methane emission events by Stanford University in a peer-reviewed study, beating a range of multi-bn dollar competitors like Maxar.

Learn more at https://orbio.earth

name: Feanix Biotechnologies
one_liner: Farm Genetics Made Easy - Using DNA and Software
long_description: Feanix is a trailblazing force in the trillion-dollar animal breeding industry. Feanix leverages proprietary genetic testing advancements to provide genetics and breeding as a service.

name: Healthtech 1
one_liner: Navigating patients to the right place, first time.
long_description:
Healthtech-1 builds clinical AI that navigates patients to the right place, first time. Today we automate eligibility checks, triage and appointment booking for 1,600+ NHS GP practices.

Tomorrow, every healthcare appointment - GP, pharmacy, dentist, physio - is instantly bookable on bookable.health.

Why now?
The NHS has come a long way, but access to it hasn't. Patient satisfaction is at a 25-year low. Automating access to care - eligibility, triage, booking - is how we reverse the trend.

name: Letterbook
one_liner: AI-native customer support platform
long_description: Letterbook is the AI-native alternative to Zendesk, Freshdesk, Zohodesk, and Intercom. We help companies manage and resolve customer support tickets across email, in-app feedback, and website forms. Our AI will triage your tickets, write replies, and build your knowledge base.

name: Goldbridge
one_liner: Ramp for Real Estate
long_description:
Goldbridge is building the financial operating system for the largest asset class in the world – real estate. More than $1T in rent flows through landlord bank accounts annually, with roughly a quarter locked in idle reserves and security deposits – and billions more leaking from unnecessary property expenses. And with $2.5T in real estate loans about to mature in 2027/28, property owners are desperate to boost their income ASAP. 

Goldbridge solves this problem by creating the first AI-powered banking platform for real estate owners. We are backed by Y Combinator and other world-class investors, and our founding team includes a 2x YC founder, former White House advisor, and 100-unit real estate owner/operator with deep industry expertise. Come help us redefine the future of real estate.
subindustry: Real Estate and Construction -> Housing and Real Estate

name: Flex

long_description: Flex is a payment platform for businesses to accept HSA/FSA, unlocking the $150B per year sitting in HSA/FSA accounts.

name: Onyx

Onyx is the open source chat UI connected to your company’s docs, apps, and people. We ingest and sync from all sources of information (Google Drive, Slack, GitHub, Confluence, Salesforce, etc.) to provide a centralized place for users to ask about anything. Imagine your most knowledgeable co-workers, all-rolled into one, and available 24/7!

Check us out on Github: https://www.github.com/onyx-dot-app/onyx
Or visit our website: https://www.onyx.app/

name: Driver

long_description: Driver is the context layer that translates your codebase into shared, structured understanding. By computing context ahead of time, Driver delivers symbol‑complete documentation, architecture maps, and history guides so teams and agents can reason across an entire codebase without guesswork.

name: Gumloop

Gumloop is a platform for automating repetitive and complex workflows end-to-end with AI. 

Builders drag, drop, and connect modular components onto a canvas to build powerful automations.

We provide the tools and the infrastructure to operate at 10x the speed of writing, testing, and productionizing code so you can focus on the problem at hand.

name: Event Horizon Labs
one_liner: AI research lab automating all of investing
long_description: We are scaling autonomous research, Markets are our verification loop: agents turn hypotheses into strategies, test them, and compound what survives.

name: Upsolve AI
one_liner: Deploy trustworthy data agent that know your business
long_description: Upsolve AI is the analytics platform for deploying governed, grounded, and trustworthy data agents that know your business. Data teams use Upsolve's Agent Studio to get to AI-ready data foundations fast, unify and curate their context layer, and test, tune and monitor their Upsolve Data Agent to their benchmark. The company is founded by Ka Ling Wu and Serguei Balanovich, who built a similar product at Palantir before (featured in Palantir's S-1), growing it to 50+ enterprise customers and 8-figures of annual revenue in 2 years.

name: Navier AI
one_liner: Agent-Driven Engineering
long_description:
Navier AI is building the first Agent-Driven Engineering platform.

We believe engineers should focus on designing great products, not wrestling with simulation software.

Navier AI makes it simple to run CFD simulations at scale through our web-based platform built on OpenFOAM, the industry-standard solver for CFD. Our AI agents autonomously handle the complex, time-consuming steps of simulation—from geometry cleanup and meshing to solver configuration and cloud resource management.

By automating the tedious parts of the workflow, we enable engineering teams to move faster, explore more design possibilities, and spend their time on high-value engineering decisions.

name: DryMerge
one_liner: AI that updates your CRM for you
long_description:
We create AI agents that constantly monitor emails, calendar, calls, or wherever else companies have relationship data and organize it into CRM records as meticulously as a great rep would.

We build these agents on top of the DryMerge platform, a tool to build AI agents that integrate with business apps and work in the background.

name: Relari
one_liner: AI Agent Builder for Software 3.0
long_description:
Relari is building the infrastructure for trustworthy AI agents in the Software 3.0 era.
We’re the company behind Nuvi.dev — a natural language agent builder that turns plain-English specifications into intelligent, verifiable agents — as well as the open-source frameworks Agent Contract and continuous-eval, which ensure AI systems behave as intended.

name: Scritch
one_liner: AI operating system for veterinary care
long_description: Scritch is building the leading AI systems for veterinary medicine, starting with voice agents that automate front-desk operations in veterinary practices.

name: Legora
one_liner: The AI workspace for lawyers
long_description:
Legora is an AI-powered workspace for law firms and legal professionals. 

Legora lets lawyers automate their repetitive tasks and access public sources and their own data on one single platform.

Learn more at https://www.legora.com/

name: ego
one_liner: AI applied research lab building synthetic sapience; human-like AI
long_description: we are making AI feel more human starting with voice. ai applied research lab training a novel end-to-end model & productizing what makes AI more personal, persistent, and human. frontier AI, like Claude and ChatGPT, are weak on memory, personality, relationship, and human-like interaction...that's our domain.

name: Cora
one_liner: AI Fitness Coach
long_description:
Cora is a mobile app that provides personalized fitness coaching using health and wearable data. Cora is built for people who want structure and guidance in their training, but don’t benefit from generic programs or static plans. By connecting to Apple Watch and other health data sources, Cora understands a user’s current fitness level and adapts coaching, insights, and training plans over time.

With Cora, users get:
- Coaching and insights based on real health and wearable data
- Adaptive training plans that evolve with fitness level
- Nutrition tracking with smart macro targets based on your goals
- Clear guidance on training, recovery, and progress over time
- A simple way to understand where they are and what to do next

name: Greptile
one_liner: AI code review agent with complete context of your codebase
long_description:
Greptile reviews pull requests with full context of the codebase. 

Top YC companies like PostHog, Raycast, Vouch, Podium, and YC's own internal software team use Greptile to review millions of changes every week. 

When companies start using Greptile, they catch more bugs and merge PRs 4x faster, on average

Greptile can be used via the cloud, or be hosted 100% on your cloud in an air-gapped VPC.

name: Ubicloud
one_liner: Open source alternative to AWS
long_description:
Ubicloud is an open source cloud that can run anywhere.

Our cloud services include elastic compute, block storage, virtual networking, managed Postgres, K8s, AI inference, and powerful IAM. Ubicloud provides these services on bare metal providers, such as Hetzner, Leaseweb, or AWS Bare Metal.

You can self-host our software or use our managed service to reduce your cloud costs by 3-10x.

name: Happenstance
one_liner: People search powered by AI
long_description:
Happenstance is people search powered by AI.

For example, you ask Happenstance "find people who work on notification systems at big companies", and it comes back with two who follow you on Twitter and five who are connected to your partners. That kind of thing you just can't do on LinkedIn.

name: Duckie
one_liner: Build AI Support Agents in Minutes
long_description:
Duckie lets customer support teams build their own AI agents in minutes! 

With Duckie, support teams can translate their tasks and processes into predictable and reliable AI workflows that saves them time and money. Folks use Duckie to handle a wide range of use cases, from answers customers technical questions to processing refunds, and everything in between.

name: ion design
one_liner: AI that creates & tests 100s of landing pages for your product
long_description:
ion designs and launches hundreds of on-brand pages for your website, so you close more deals, rank better, and turn your website into a growth engine.

Every ad campagin, use case, case study, and competitor comparison gets its own dedicated page, designed to convert.

It's like a growth designer working 24/7 to help you convert more traffic.

name: Tekton Dynamics
one_liner: AI control layer for welding robots
long_description:
Our mission is to empower every manufacturer, no matter their scale, to invent and build anything using intelligent robots.

Today’s industrial robots are fast but "blind". They struggle with any task that isn't perfectly repetitive. We are building the eyes and brain (a proprietary vision system and AI model) that allow industrial robots to see, reason, and perform complex work with sub-millimeter accuracy and the adaptability of a human expert.
